ZEW: After a period of absent demand, private consumption can be expected to gain momentum in the next six months.
Aurora Mobile integrates DeepSeek into JPush to enhance push services, offering smarter notifications - Feb 18, 2025.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China on February 18, 2025, Aurora Mobile Limited (NASDAQ: JG) shared that their key product, JPush, has effectively incorporated DeepSeek, a top-tier large language model (LLM) recognized for its streamlined design and specialized enhancements. This advancement highlights a pivotal moment in JPush’s progress, empowering developers to provide more intelligent, personalized, and efficient push notifications to their audience.

London judge approves emergency loan for Thames Water. Amount of the loan undisclosed.
Investors show highest risk appetite in 15 years per BofA survey.
Hyperliquid introduces HyperEVM on layer-1 blockchain, announces bug bounty program with rewards up to $1 million for security flaws.
news.summary: Hyperliquid has introduced HyperEVM on its primary blockchain platform, in addition to announcing a bug bounty initiative with rewards of up to $1 million for identifying security flaws.

news.headline: Israeli Foreign Minister Saar: We demand complete demilitarization of Gaza.
Fitch Ratings: Trade war risk rises for global macro and credit.
Mediwaste rebrands as remedi, Texas' only medical waste recycler. Shift in industry; significant change.
news.summary: An exclusive company based in Texas authorized to recycle medical waste has unveiled its official rebranding as remedi on Feb. 18, 2025. The company, formerly known as Mediwaste, stands as the sole entity in the state permitted for such activities. This shift not only involves a change in name but also signals a notable transformation within the medical waste sector.

Top bank Sparekassen Kronjylland boosts satisfaction by partnering with Agillic for improved services.

BoE Gov. Bailey: Disinflation is continuing.

China FX Regulator: Cross-border Yuan usage has significantly increased, can better mitigate external shocks, and help market trades to be more rational and orderly.
Future Crime Summit 2025 in New Delhi gathered 1,000 experts to discuss AI and cybercrime challenges.
news.summary: In a recent event in New Delhi, the 2025 Future Crime Summit gathered more than 1,000 professionals, including experts, law enforcement personnel, and defense authorities. The summit aimed to address the escalating issues related to cybercrime and explore the most recent AI-powered strategies. Discussions revolved around various crucial subjects such as AI-facilitated assaults, ransomware, cryptocurrency scams, weaknesses in blockchain technology, and the potential threats posed by quantum computing. Professor Dr. Triveni Singh, the creator of the Future Crime forum, was present at the summit alongside Deputy Iqbal Hassan.

news.headline: Qurate Retail Announces Semi-Annual Interest Payment and Regular Additional Distribution on 3.75% Senior Exchangeable Debentures Due 2030
news.summary: ENGLEWOOD, Colo.--Qurate Retail, Inc. made a public announcement regarding a payment update today. The company confirmed the distribution of a semi-annual interest payment and Regular Additional Distribution to the holders of the 3.75% Senior Exchangeable Debentures due 2030. These debentures were issued by Liberty Interactive LLC, Qurate Retail's wholly-owned subsidiary. Holders as of February 1, 2025, will receive an interest payment of $18.75 for every $1,000 original principal amount of Debentures they possess.

news.headline: FLSmidth appoints 2 new execs to lead Mining Prod & Service, strengthening team {}.
Crédit Agricole Notes on GBP
Market Decipher projects 6.2% CAGR growth in collectibles market from $512 billion in 2025, worldwide.
news.summary: New research on various collectibles such as coins, currency, stamps, trading cards, sports memorabilia, TCG/Pokémon cards, toys, consumer goods collectibles, and figurines has been released by Market Decipher, a top market research company. The study was published on Feb. 18, 2025, in PUNE, India. The report offers comprehensive insights into the market trends and growth opportunities in these sectors. Investors and collectors can benefit from the detailed analysis provided by the research firm.

news.headline: Kremlin: We cannot give an evaluation of the negotiations with the US officials yet as they have only just started.
Kremlin: The main thing is to achieve our aims.
Kremlin: Of course we would prefer to achieve our aims peacefully.
Vantage Foundation volunteers spread hope and joy at SOS Children's Villages in the Philippines on Feb. 18, 2025.
news.summary: In a heartwarming demonstration of unity, volunteers from Vantage Foundation joined forces on Feb. 18, 2025 in Manila, Philippines. The volunteers dedicated their time to a day of giving and bonding at SOS Children's Villages in the country. This initiative went beyond simply providing support as volunteers engaged in various activities to uplift the spirits of the children. The event witnessed the participation of a significant number of volunteers, showcasing the power of community involvement and compassion.

news.headline: InterDigital & Keysight to showcase AI-enabled sensing at Mobile World Congress 2025 for dynamic use cases.
news.summary: InterDigital and Keysight are collaborating to showcase cutting-edge technology that enables highly accurate AI-based sensing in dynamic environments. The demonstration aims to highlight the adaptability of this technology for immersive, location-based use cases. This innovation promises precision and reliability, crucial for scenarios where accuracy is paramount. The collaboration between the two companies showcases their commitment to pushing the boundaries of what is possible in the realm of AI-driven sensing technologies. This development signifies a significant step forward in creating immersive experiences tailored to specific environments.

news.headline: China commercial banks sell net $45.3 bln of forex in January vs net sell of $10.6 bln in December - FX Regulator.
Globavend (Nasdaq: GVH) given 180-day grace period by Nasdaq to meet $1.00 minimum bid price for continued listing.
news.summary: On Feb. 18, 2025, Globavend Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: GVH) disclosed that Nasdaq has provided them with a 180-day extension, until Aug. 11, 2025, to meet the $1.00 minimum bid price for their ordinary shares to stay listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market. The announcement came after Globavend received a letter from Nasdaq on Feb. 13, 2025, regarding this issue. This extension allows the company more time to work on complying with the Minimum Bid Price Requirement.

news.headline: 3D Investment Partners issues open letter to Sapporo's Board, citing concerns of lack of capital discipline amid M&A impairments.
news.summary: In Tokyo, 3D Investment Partners Pte. Ltd., managing assets for 3D OPPORTUNITY MASTER FUND, a significant shareholder of Sapporo Holdings Limited (2501.T), has addressed Sapporo's Board of Directors with an open letter. The letter highlights concerns about capital discipline issues that have negatively impacted the company's value for an extended period.

news.headline: OPEX® Corp upgrades Infinity® AS/RS system with 15% storage payload increase & new slotting capabilities in 2022.
news.summary: A leading company in Next Generation Automation, OPEX® Corporation based in Moorestown, New Jersey, has announced major upgrades to its Infinity® Automated Storage and Retrieval System (AS/RS). The enhancements include a 15% boost in the system's storage payload capacity and the addition of new storage slotting functionalities. Launched in 2022, the Infinity AS/RS offers exceptional storage density and flexibility for warehouse, document, and mail automation solutions.

news.headline: Semtech launches RClamp10022PWQ for automotive Ethernet protection, compliant with Open Alliance specs.
news.summary: Semtech Corporation has introduced the RClamp10022PWQ, a two-line transient voltage suppressor for automotive Ethernet applications. The device is compliant with Open Alliance specifications for automotive Ethernet interfaces like 10BASE-T1S, 100BASE-T1, and 1000BASE-T1. Semtech Corporation (Nasdaq: SMTC) is a high-performance semiconductor, IoT systems, and cloud connectivity service provider.

news.headline: Emburse introduces Apple Pay to UK customers for travel and expense solutions.
news.summary: Emburse, a company providing innovative travel and expense management solutions, is introducing Apple Pay to its customers in the UK. This enhancement allows UK customers to conveniently utilize Apple Pay for transactions. This move showcases Emburse's commitment to offering modern payment options to its clientele in the UK.

news.headline: Geek+ partners with ECC for first project in South Africa, targeting online retailer Takealot, in a game-changing move.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in Johannesburg, Geekplus, a top player in mobile robot and smart logistics technologies, revealed its inaugural venture in South Africa. The project is a partnership with European Conveyors and Components (ECC) aimed at enhancing operations for the nation's online retailer.

news.headline: Element Six and Master Drilling partner to enhance tunnel development tech using diamond cutting, benefits mining, infra, energy sectors.
news.summary: Cutting-edge diamond-enhanced technology has been introduced to accelerate tunneling development processes, offering promising outcomes for the mining, infrastructure, transportation, and energy industries. This innovation is set to significantly boost development speed, cut down costs, and mitigate environmental consequences during construction. The revolutionary technology has been successful in trials conducted in OXFORD, England, and JOHANNESBURG. This advancement is expected to bring about a 20% increase in tunneling speed, leading to a notable reduction of 15% in overall costs. Furthermore, a substantial decrease in environmental impact is anticipated, with estimates suggesting a 25% reduction in carbon emissions.

news.headline: InterDigital to exhibit innovations at MWC, highlighting 6G and immersive video, collaboration with Keysight.
news.summary: InterDigital will showcase advancements in wireless technology, video capabilities, and artificial intelligence. They have partnered with Keysight for research collaboration. The focus will be on the evolution towards 6G networks and immersive video experiences. Key highlights include cutting-edge research and development initiatives in wireless, video, and AI, with a particular emphasis on shaping the future of 6G technology. This collaborative effort aims to push the boundaries of innovation in the industry.

news.headline: Etex and Cognizant extend partnership to enhance innovation with AI and Automation, aiming to cut costs and improve user experience.
news.summary: Cognizant (CTSH) has recently confirmed the extension of its partnership with Etex in Brussels on Feb. 18, 2025. The collaboration aims to enhance user experience and cut overall costs by leveraging Cognizant's IT services. The partnership renewal signifies a continued commitment to improving operational efficiency and customer satisfaction for Etex.

news.headline: SellYourWay.org releases new white paper on maintaining confidentiality in small business sales, Feb. 18, 2025.
news.summary: Today, an educational website focused on small business owner education, SellYourWay.org, based in Independence, Ohio, released a comprehensive white paper titled "How Can I Keep the Sale of My Business Confidential?" by author Emmet. This new publication provides detailed insights on maintaining confidentiality during business sales. The white paper covers a range of valuable information and strategies for business owners looking to keep their sales private. This release marks an important addition to the website, aiming to assist small business owners in managing the sale process effectively.

news.headline: CPA on Fire marks 1-year milestone for Andrew Hawkins as Tax Director and Lead Tax Strategist, key in developing 3-to-5-year tax strategies.
news.summary: In Fremont, Ohio, on February 18, 2025, CPA on Fire celebrates the one-year milestone of Andrew Hawkins, CPA, serving as Tax Director and Lead Tax Strategist. During his first year, he has been instrumental in creating and executing long-term tax plans spanning 3 to 5 years, guaranteeing their flexibility and effectiveness.

news.headline: Cellid Inc. to showcase self-developed AR glasses at MWC Barcelona 2025, aiming for accessibility and innovation.
news.summary: Introducing a cutting-edge AR glasses reference model for enhanced accessibility, Cellid Inc., a company specializing in AR glasses displays and spatial recognition engines, is set to showcase its latest technology at MWC Barcelona, the premier mobile exhibition. The event will take place in Tokyo on February 18, 2025. Be part of this significant unveiling featuring state-of-the-art features designed to revolutionize the AR industry. Stay tuned for insights and updates on this innovative development.

news.headline: Baidu reveals Q4 and FY 2024 results: strong financial performance. Check NASDAQ: BIDU and HKEX: 9888 for details.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, Baidu, Inc. (NASDAQ: BIDU, HKEX: 9888 - HKD Counter, 89888 - RMB Counter), a prominent AI firm rooted in the Internet sector, revealed its unaudited financial performance for the quarter and fiscal year that concluded.

news.headline: iQIYI reports Q4 and FY 2024 financial results. Key numbers undisclosed.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, iQIYI, Inc. (Nasdaq: IQ), a prominent provider of online entertainment video services in China, unveiled its unaudited financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Trump and Putin's teams set to discuss Ukraine in Saudi amid European anger | Daybreak: Europe 02/18/2025, Bloomberg.
news.summary: Teams representing Presidents Trump and Putin are scheduled to meet in Saudi Arabia to discuss the escalating situation in Ukraine, causing concern among European nations. The meeting is set to take place on February 18, 2025, and has sparked outrage across Europe. This important diplomatic event is being closely watched as tensions continue to rise in the region.

news.headline: Pakistan plans to achieve IMF target without increasing burden on taxpayers, according to latest report.
